name: Propertyware Property Management API
what_it_does: Propertyware REST API for cloud-based property management platform targeting single-family residential portfolios. Enables AI agents to manage property and unit data retrieval for portfolio administration, handle lease and tenant management data access including payment history, access maintenance request and work order tracking for property operations, retrieve owner accounting and distribution report data, manage prospect and leasing pipeline data for vacancy management, handle inspection scheduling and report data management, access vendor payment and bill management data for property accounting, retrieve portfolio performance metrics and occupancy analytics, manage tenant screening integration data access, and integrate property management data with accounting, maintenance, and reporting platforms.
use_cases: Tracking tenant payments from property management automation agents
Managing maintenance workflows from operations automation agents
Generating owner financial reports from investor relations agents
Monitoring vacancy rates from leasing optimization agents
not_for: Multi-family and apartment management without single-family portfolio focus
Commercial real estate without residential property management needs
Institutional REIT without small-to-mid property manager focus
best_when: A single-family residential property management company using Propertyware wants AI agents to automate tenant management, maintenance coordination, owner reporting, and portfolio performance analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant PII including SSN from screening, payment history, and financial data requires strict FCRA and state landlord-tenant law compliance. Automated late fee and eviction notice generation requires jurisdiction-specific legal validation. Tenant data is regulated under CCPA and GDPR for applicable tenants.

auth.notes: Propertyware uses API key authentication (basic auth with org ID and key). Per-organization credentials. API documentation at app.propertyware.com. No webhooks — polling required for event detection. REST API with JSON. Part of RealPage (acquired 2014). Dallas, Texas HQ. Strong in single-family residential property management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription per unit
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit monthly pricing; base plus per-unit fee
pricing.notes: Dallas, Texas. Part of RealPage (acquired 2014). Single-family property management market. 15,000+ property management companies. Strong in SFPM (Single Family Property Management) segment. API less developer-friendly vs. newer entrants. Competes with AppFolio and Buildium for property management software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant screening and financial data is FCRA-regulated; automated access requires permissible purpose compliance and data governance controls
No webhooks — Propertyware has no webhook support; polling required for all event detection; high-frequency polling may hit rate limits
Basic auth API key pattern — authentication uses org ID + API key via HTTP Basic auth; non-standard pattern requires careful implementation
RealPage integration dependency — Propertyware is part of RealPage ecosystem; some features require RealPage parent platform access
Single-family focus only — Propertyware is optimized for single-family residential; multi-family and commercial PM use cases are not well-supported
Older API surface — Propertyware API predates modern REST conventions; some endpoints have legacy patterns not aligned with current REST best practices
agent_readiness.security_notes: Single-family property management. SOC2, CCPA. API key. US. Tenant personal and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key. US. Tenant personal and payment data.
